text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, December 11. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I can run some projections for you. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
